description_long: This object is a game controller with a classic ergonomic design, featuring two prominent hand grips and a central control panel. The surface is mottled with a mix of dark gray, black, and reddish-brown, giving it a weathered, almost stone-like appearance. The front face displays a familiar layout of buttons, including a directional pad on the left, four action buttons on the right, and two analog sticks symmetrically placed below. Shoulder buttons are visible on the top edge, and the back is smooth with no visible ports or battery compartments. The overall form is compact and contoured for handheld use, with all interactive elements clustered on the front. The object appears solid and robust, likely constructed from plastic with internal electronic components.
description: A weathered, dark gray and black game controller with a classic button and joystick layout, designed for handheld use. The surface has a mottled, stone-like appearance and features prominent grips and interactive controls on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full array of buttons, joysticks, and directional pad, highlighting the main interactive features.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the contoured grip and the profile of the analog stick and shoulder button.
description_view_2: The back view displays a smooth, mottled surface with no visible controls or ports, emphasizing the ergonomic shape.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the right grip, the side profile of the buttons, and the shoulder button.
